channel.title: renegadescienceteacher TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from renegadescienceteacher

item.title: Replying to @william_c90 You can still support this fundraiser for the next 24 hours or you can donate directly to the Immigrant Legal Resource Center on their website. 🖕🧊! #science #biology #ice #learnontiktok #eat

item.title: They're totally normal and thet usually don't hurt the plant, but they freak me right the math out. #biology #science #plants #scary #learnontiktok

item.title: After a long day of debating theists and MAGA cultists, it's nice to be able to bring home such an undeniable W. #atheist #debate #religious #gross #food @Jovan Bradley

item.title: It's right in the middle and I just have to pretend like I don't see it every goddamn day. Help us, @UsefulCharts! You're our only hope! #Science #biology #life #evolution #pepper
item.description: It's right in the middle and I just have to pretend like I don't see it every goddamn day. Help us, @UsefulCharts! You're our only hope! #Science #biology #life #evolution #pepper

item.title: This is the funniest and weirdest thing that's ever happened to me and I'm so excited to share it with you. #science #biology #movie #beauty #staytuned

item.title: This was my cold open from today's show. If you have questions or complaints about any part of it, feel free to pick up the phone. I host AXP the first Sunday of every month and The Line every Sunday (including in the evening after AXP). #science #skeptic
item.description: This was my cold open from today's show. If you have questions or complaints about any part of it, feel free to pick up the phone. I host AXP the first Sunday of every month and The Line every Sunday (including in the evening after AXP). #science #skeptic

item.title: I've had this poem memorized since I was around 13. I never knew that I'd need it at 33. #poetry #politics #learn #antifascist #poem
item.description: I've had this poem memorized since I was around 13. I never knew that I'd need it at 33. #poetry #politics #learn #antifascist #poem

item.title: I cannot comprehend how anyone could even remotely support this. It's a shame there's no such thing as a Hell for them to burn in. #america #usa #immigration #fdt #musicfestival
item.description: I cannot comprehend how anyone could even remotely support this. It's a shame there's no such thing as a Hell for them to burn in. #america #usa #immigration #fdt #musicfestival
